title: 警員關家榮嘅兩個仔女去咗英國, 一齊打鍵戰篤灰

replies.msg:
頂住檔先 template, 巴絲 can improve this a lot
tip form website: https://www.mi5.gov.uk/modal_forms/nojs/webform/363
email to home office, UK: public.enquiries@homeoffice.gov.uk

template below in #2

Report: the 2 daughters of a grave human rights abuser taking freedom away from Hong Kong (HK), Mr.Kwan Ka Wing (spelling may be inaccurate) 關家榮. He's a police officer in HK. His daughters may harm the national security of the UK by spying or performing operations beneficial to the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) and harmful to the UK.
Here is a video of him shooting live bullet(s) towards an unarmed & not aggressive protester:
https://youtu.be/wm_s0fm4hH0
Here are the evidence on the Internet upon a DuckDuckGo search. This list is NOT exclusive, as the personal info of Mr. Kwan has been widespread that day, but many of them have been taken down:
https://hkchronicles.com/data/%E9%97%9C%E5%AE%B6%E6%A6%AE%EF%BC%9A%E9%A6%99%E6%B8%AF%E8%AD%A6%E5%AF%9F%EF%BC%8C%E6%BF%AB%E6%AC%8A%E9%BB%91%E8%AD%A6%20PC5199
https://hk.appledaily.com/local/20191112/C3TOYHHZCWGS5Y3UFHUC2KTYCI/
https://www.ntdtv.com/b5/2019/11/11/a102704732.html
https://www.soundofhope.org/post/314381?lang=b5
https://www.ntdtv.com/b5/2019/11/11/a102704550.html
I noticed the following tweet:
https://twitter.com/lchaim2life/status/1294176193525116929?s=20
Basically, this Chinese tweet says that the 2 daughters of Mr. Kwan are in the UK. If this is true, this may be a serious national security threat.

Moreover, the assets of Mr. Kwan in the UK should be frozen and seized by the UK government. The daughters of Mr. Kwan may be helping Mr. Kwan to evade UK actions, so their assets should be frozen and seized as well, using the Magnisky Act, terrorism-related acts with transnational jurisdictions, or other legislations applicable.
好應該大大力同反美反英既小粉紅講

不過我地可以用「既有事實」去做鳩佢
即係用佢「現任黑警」既身份去投訴佢

Report: the 2 daughters of a grave human rights abuser taking freedom away from Hong Kong (HK), Mr.Kwan Ka Wing (spelling may be inaccurate) 關家榮. He's a police officer in HK. His daughters may harm the national security of the UK by spying or performing operations beneficial to the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) and harmful to the UK.
Here is a video of him shooting live bullet(s) towards an unarmed & not aggressive protester:
https://youtu.be/wm_s0fm4hH0
Here are the evidence on the Internet upon a DuckDuckGo search. This list is NOT exclusive, as the personal info of Mr. Kwan has been widespread that day, but many of them have been taken down:
https://hkchronicles.com/data/%E9%97%9C%E5%AE%B6%E6%A6%AE%EF%BC%9A%E9%A6%99%E6%B8%AF%E8%AD%A6%E5%AF%9F%EF%BC%8C%E6%BF%AB%E6%AC%8A%E9%BB%91%E8%AD%A6%20PC5199
https://hk.appledaily.com/local/20191112/C3TOYHHZCWGS5Y3UFHUC2KTYCI/
https://www.ntdtv.com/b5/2019/11/11/a102704732.html
https://www.soundofhope.org/post/314381?lang=b5
https://www.ntdtv.com/b5/2019/11/11/a102704550.html
I noticed the following tweet:
https://twitter.com/lchaim2life/status/1294176193525116929?s=20
Basically, this Chinese tweet says that the 2 daughters of Mr. Kwan are in the UK. If this is true, this may be a serious national security threat.

Moreover, the assets of Mr. Kwan in the UK should be frozen and seized by the UK government. The daughters of Mr. Kwan may be helping Mr. Kwan to evade UK actions, so their assets should be frozen and seized as well, using the Magnisky Act, terrorism-related acts with transnational jurisdictions, or other legislations applicable.
